name: Harry Hill
blurb: Harry Hill is an English comedian, writer and presenter who left a career as a medical doctor to pursue stand-up, winning the Perrier Best Newcomer award in 1992.
bio: Harry Hill is an English comedian, writer and presenter who left a career as a medical doctor to pursue stand-up, winning the Perrier Best Newcomer award in 1992. His act fuses surrealism, slapstick, observational comedy and music, performed in his trademark large-collared shirt and browline glasses. He is widely known for the television shows Harry Hill and Harry Hills TV Burp and for narrating Youve Been Framed.

timeline.ev: Wins the Perrier Award for Best Newcomer at the Edinburgh Festival Fringe
Begins the radio series Harry Hills Fruit Corner on BBC Radio 4
Launches his own television series Harry Hill on Channel 4
Harry Hills TV Burp begins its long ITV run
Wins the BAFTA for Best Entertainment Performance

accolades: Multiple British Comedy Awards for TV Burp
